design_philosophy: Midnight Editorial. A fusion of high-fashion editorial asymmetry with tech-forward brutalism. The design relies on pure typography, deep void-like backgrounds, and sharp contrasting borders. Products are treated like art exhibits, not just commodities. Negative space is a structural element.

headings.instruction: Import via Google Fonts. Use exclusively for H1, H2, and massive hero text.

body.instruction: Import via Google Fonts. Use for standard UI elements and product descriptions.

mono.instruction: Import via Google Fonts. Use for tech-specs, prices, overlines, and metadata.

typography.rules: Never use generic sans (like Inter) for headings. Keep fluid scaling (text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl) for hero, do not exceed text-6xl. Maintain tight line-heights (leading-none) for headings.

colors.rules: No generic SaaS blue. Use #0a0a0a as the core void background. Use the neon chartreuse (#d1ff4c) purely as an accent for the critical 'Buy on Amazon' / CTA buttons to trigger absolute attention. No generic full-screen gradients.

surfaces_and_textures.glassmorphism: Use Crystal variant for the sticky nav. `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10`. NEVER use full transparent header.
surfaces_and_textures.borders: 1px solid white/10 (border-white/10) for cards. Expose the grid skeleton on the categories page.
surfaces_and_textures.texture: Implement a subtle SVG noise overlay across the main body to kill the flat 'digital' feel and simulate physical medium.

layouts_and_grids.landing_page: Bento 'Tetris' grid. Asymmetrical, overlapping sections. Massive paddings (py-24, py-32). Use text sizes boldly. Do not center everything; use left-aligned stark structures.
layouts_and_grids.category_page: High density image grids but broken by negative space. Use pure CSS Grid.
layouts_and_grids.product_page: Split layout. 50vw sticky image on left, scrolling specs and editorial description on the right. Minimalist.
layouts_and_grids.admin_panel: Dense, functional, 'Swiss' tabular style. No soft shadows, hard 1px borders.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Product cards: subtle lift (-translate-y-1), border brightens to border-white/30. Image scale inside card overflow-hidden.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight Y-axis reveal for page enters.
motion_and_interactions.rules: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations must be elegant and crisp, not bouncy or cartoonish.

components_strategy.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind for Hero, Categories grid, and custom sections. No Shadcn wrappers for core layouts to maintain fluid asymmetry.
components_strategy.ui_elements: Use Shadcn components ONLY for interactive logic (Search Dialog, Forms, Admin tables). Strip Vercel-look by overriding rounded corners to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none), high contrast. 'Buy on Amazon' CTA must use the primary neon color. Others should be pure border (border border-white/20 hover:bg-white hover:text-black).

landing_hero.description: Abstract dark geometric setup for the landing page hero.

electronics.description: Spherical premium electronic device on dark background.

home.description: Retro tech / CRT TV for the Home category.

fashion.description: Urban night city aesthetic for Fashion/Lifestyle.

sports.description: Black and white pool table for Sports.

books.description: Open book by candlelight for Books.

beauty.description: Woman in dark aesthetic for Beauty.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Write components in .js or .jsx, NOT .tsx, as specified in the environment.
Do not converge towards generic 'AI slop' aesthetic. Center-aligned text and generic heavy gradients are strictly banned.
You MUST NOT apply universal transitions (e.g. `transition: all`). Create custom transitions for specific transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in App.css.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
Avoid using placeholder URLs. Use the exact provided image URLs from the image_urls block.
Never hide desktop navigation behind a hamburger menu.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds for elements where content will scroll underneath it. ALWAYS use backdrop-blur + semi-transparent dark colors.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses text-shadow or a gradient underlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent`) to hit 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must be explicitly styled (e.g., `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none`).
accessibility.motion: Wrap major framer-motion animations in `useReducedMotion` hooks or standard media queries if pure CSS.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the app enforcing the `.dark` class by default on HTML/body. 2. Install Google Fonts (`Cormorant Garamond`, `Manrope`, `JetBrains Mono`) in index.html. 3. Configure Tailwind config with the specific dark mode colors mapped above. 4. Build three main routes: Landing, Categories, Products + an Admin panel route. 5. Append `?tag=4StarAbove` to all outgoing Amazon product links dynamically.
